# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Service
    name: default
  namespaceSelector:
    matchLabels:
      kubernetes.io/metadata.name: default
  rules:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          kubernetes.io/metadata.name: default
    ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: HTTP
    - port: 443
      protocol: HTTPS
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          kubernetes.io/metadata.name: linkerd
    ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: HTTP
    - port: 443
      protocol: HTTPS
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          kubernetes.io/metadata.name: istio-system
    ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: HTTP
    - port: 443
      protocol: HTTPS
